---
title: "Thermoluminescence and optically stimulated luminescence of CaSO4:Mn,Tb with different dopant concentrations"
date: 2025-12-01
author:
  - name: Silva, A.M.B.
  - name: Souza, D.N.
  - name: Caldas, L.V.E.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Radiation Physics and Chemistry"
  volume: 237
  doi: "10.1016/j.radphyschem.2025.113032"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Thermoluminescence and optically stimulated luminescence of CaSO4:Mn,Tb with different dopant concentrations</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
